name: Galymzhan Yessimbek
title: Business Analyst at BCC · AI / LLM Engineer · Full-stack Developer · Creative Technologist
summary: I build AI-powered systems, internal automation tools, interactive data experiences and full-stack products at the intersection of technology, finance and creative engineering. My background combines Cyberphysics, Financial Analytics, banking/customer experience, backend/API development, RAG systems, local LLM experiments and interactive frontend products.
positioning: Banking CX and virtual assistant improvement
highlights: Currently working at Bank CenterCredit as a Business Analyst focused on digital customer experience and virtual assistant quality improvement.
Built PBI Monitor: a working desktop/internal automation tool for daily Power BI dashboard refresh checks and business analytics workflows.
Developed a full-stack internal data catalog during an internship at the Agency of the Republic of Kazakhstan for Regulation and Development of Financial Market using Django, Vue.js and PostgreSQL.
Published a CBDC article in Банки Казахстана №3, 2025: Central Bank Digital Currencies (CBDC): evolution, comparative analysis and prospects for financial systems.
Won DLD Hackathon 2022 at KIMEP University with a solution for a MOST company case.
Built a local-LLM/RAG concept for a Telegram-based company knowledge assistant using Ollama, ChromaDB, PostgreSQL and Python.
Delivered FinCat: a full-stack financial organizations catalog with Django REST Framework, Nuxt 3, JWT auth, roles, CRUD and Dockerized PostgreSQL.
Built AbafarConvertor: a YouTube-to-MP3 utility with Node/Express backend and Expo/React Native client structure.
Completed CBDC research using OLS regression, econometrics and macroeconomic indicators with Digital Tenge context.

experience.summary: Business analyst role focused on improving the virtual assistant Aibek, analyzing customer conversations, refining dialogue quality and supporting digital customer support products.
highlights: Moderate and continuously improve the virtual assistant Aibek by analyzing customer conversations and refining response quality.
Review and optimize response logic and dialogue scenarios to improve accuracy, relevance and customer satisfaction.
Analyze chat data and recurring customer inquiries to identify gaps in digital customer journeys.
Support the quality and reliability of digital customer support products across banking channels.

experience.summary: Foreign exchange call center specialist supporting business clients with FX contracts, international payments and currency conversions.
highlights: Guided business clients through registration of foreign exchange contracts.
Supported processing of international payments and currency conversion requests.
Handled complex inquiries in fast-paced banking support scenarios.

experience.organization: The Agency of the Republic of Kazakhstan for Regulation and Development of Financial Market
experience.summary: Developed a full-stack internal data catalog to improve data accessibility and transparency inside the organization.
highlights: Built backend functionality using Django and Python.
Built frontend interface using Vue.js.
Designed and implemented PostgreSQL database architecture for catalog data management.

experience.summary: Internship at the KBTU Nanolaboratory with practical exposure to measurement equipment and sample analysis.
highlights: Adjusted an X-ray complex.
Analyzed samples using an infrared spectrometer.
National Bank of Kazakhstan sponsored master's program context.
Research focus: Central Bank Digital Currency and macroeconomic indicators.
Methods: OLS regression, econometrics, scenario analysis, Python-based analytics.
Technical foundation across programming, data, physics and analytical modeling.
Relevant areas: machine learning, artificial intelligence, big data and computational thinking.
Completed software development training with excellent results across programming, web development, Docker, Django, Python, React Native, database theory, ASP.NET and React.
Built a React-based educational game/product as a diploma project.
Focused on frontend architecture, backend integration and product implementation.

research.title: Central Bank Digital Currency and Macroeconomic Indicators
research.description: Master research around CBDC issuance, Digital Tenge context and potential macroeconomic effects using econometric analysis and scenario thinking.
